topic_text: When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Change color of lights using LIFX. If temperature drops below F change color of LIFX Bulbs. This recipe will allow you to change the color of your LIFX lights if the temperature drops below a certain degrees.

When Tomorrow's forecast calls for from Weather Underground, do Change color of lights using LIFX. Should I bring an umbrella to work tomorrow.. Getting ready for work tomorrow morning, this will let you know if an umbrella is part of plan.
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Turn on color loop using Philips Hue. snow color loop. Its a colorfull winter

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. If it's #cloudy outside, turn on the #lights!. This recipe checks the current weather conditions and turns on the lights if it's cloudy outside.
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Change color using Philips Hue. Shine For Rain. Blue Light when it rains

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Change color using Philips Hue. It's Snowing!. Can't see the weather conditions from your bedroom window? Let your Hue tell you it's snowing!
When Temperature rises above from Nefit Easy, do Blink lights using Philips Hue. Nefit Easy with Hue. Blinks lights when room temperature reaches a certain value.

When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Send blink event using blink(1). If CO2 rises above 2000, flash a pattern. Netatmo weather station notices an unhealthy CO2 concentration and will flash a light pattern.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Send blink event using blink(1). Go See the Sunset. Don't forget to watch the sunset, people.

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Call a function using Particle. Turn "take umbrella" warning light off if weather changes to "clear". This is one in 4 Applets used to turn two warning lights over my coat rack on or off based on the weatherTwo Applets turn on, or off, a light based on temperatureThe other two turn on, or off, a light based on rainfall or clear skyWeather info from weather.com service is used to call a function on a Particle Photon that lights the warning lightsYou have to select the "digitalWrite" function on your Photon below and make sure that the lamp is connected to pin D0 (or other that you indicate in the action, below).

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Call a function using Particle. Turn "take umbrella" warning light on if weather changes to "rain". This is one in 6 Applets used to turn two warning lights over my coat rack on or off based on the weatherTwo Applets turn on, or off, a light based on temperatureThe other two turn on, or off, a light based on rainfall or clear skyWeather info from weather.com service is used to call a function on a Particle Photon that lights the warning lightsYou have to select the "digitalWrite" function on your Photon below and make sure that the lamp is connected to pin D0 (or other that you indicate in the action, below).

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Call a function using Particle. Turn "take umbrella" warning light off if weather changes to "cloudy". This is one in 6 recipes used to turn two warning lights over my coat rack on or off based on the weatherTwo recipes turn on, or off, a light based on temperatureThe other four turn on, or off, a light based on rainfall or clear skyWeather info from weather.com channel is used to call a function on a Particle Photon that lights the warning lightsYou have to select the "digitalWrite" function on your Photon below and make sure that the lamp is connected to pin D0 (or other that you indicate in the action, below).

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Blink lights using LIFX. If it starts to snow, blink my lights cyan.. If it begins snowing in your area, blink your LIFX bulb of choice to let you know.

When Tomorrow's forecast calls for from Weather Underground, do Change color of lights using LIFX. IF snow tomorrow turn LIFX bulbs blue. Turns LIFX bulbs bright blue when snow is in the forecast-ErinLYYC

When Temperature drops below from Netatmo Weather Station, do Change color using Philips Hue. If temp drops below 10C Change Colour. Part of a series of recipies to set the lighting to colour according to the outside temperature

When Carbon dioxide drops below from Netatmo Weather Station, do Partially arm your system using Myfox HomeControl. detects the presence by co2 rate 1/2. First part of presence detection to use it as optional criteria to trigger myfox, it use the security system as variable storageIf co2 rate is below 400ppm we could say that there is nobody at home, so it partialy arm system and scenarii like "all lights on if outdoor is dark" will not triggerThe second ifttt script will do the oposit.

When Carbon dioxide drops below from Netatmo Weather Station, do Blink lights using LIFX. Blink your LIFX lights with green when the room's Carbon Dioxide is back to normal. If carbon dioxide drops below 500 ppm, then blink lights
When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Breathe lights using LIFX. CO2 Warning lights. CO2 warning lights as measured by a Netatmo Indoor Modul and displayed by a Lifx Lamp.

When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Display Notification using LaMetric Time. Don't forget to open a window when CO2 level is too high. When the CO2 level gets above 1600ppm, show a message on LaMetric Time to open a window.

When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Play sound using D-Link Siren. Trigger an alarm when unsafe CO2 levels are detected. If you want to trigger an alarm in your bedroom, basement or garage when CO2 is detected, try this!

When Surf rating is at least from Surfline, do Call a function using Particle. Surf report posted to OLED screen connected to Photon.. Display surf rating and wave height on the OLED screen connected to the Photon.

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Select a preset light setting using simplehuman. Activate the overcast preset light setting on your sensor mirror when it's a cloudy day. Make sure your mirror's lighting matches the weatherIf the conditions are cloudy, your sensor mirror will automatically use the preset overcast light setting.

When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Blink lights using Philips Hue. Know when your Air is bad. Gives a warning, even in the middle of the night, if the air is bad..It just does not open your windows automatic
When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Change color using Philips Hue. Show me my Air-Quality!. Turn my Lights red when the air-quality gets bad.

When Rain no longer detected from Netatmo Weather Station, do Change color using Philips Hue. When it stops raining change the color of your lights to .... When it stops raining, change the colors of 1 or more of your lights to the color of your choise

When Temperature rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Change color using Philips Hue. Make my lights go red when it gets hot. When your Netatmo Weather Station's reaches a certain temperature, your Hue lights will become red Use an outdoor module to know if it's too hot to go outside!

When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Turn on fan for 15 minutes using Nest Thermostat. If Indoor CO2 goes up, turn on the fan.. If your indoor CO2 levels go over 750 ppm, turn on the house fan for 15 minHigh indoor CO2 can cause symptoms such as fatigue, headache, breathing difficulties, strained eyes and itchy skinOutdoor CO2 is around 400 ppm.

When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Disable your system using Myfox HomeControl. detects the presence by co2 rate 2/2. Second part of presence detection to use it as optional criteria to trigger myfox, it use the security system as variable storageIf co2 rate is higher than 400ppm we could say that there is somebody at home, so it disable security system and scenarii like "all lights on if outdoor is dark" could triggerThe other first ifttt script will do the oposit.
When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Change color of lights using LIFX. Workout Signal. Change color of lights based on CO2
When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Turn relay on momentarily using WeMo Maker. VMC boost on if CO2 > 1000ppm. VMC boost on if CO2 > 1000ppm to get a cleaner air inside

When Hub status changed from SkylinkNet, do Change color using Philips Hue. Turn Philips Hue to Red when SkylinkNet is in Panic (Alarm). When SkylinkNet is in Panic mode, Philips Hue will turn on red.

When Every hour at from Date & Time, do Publish an event using Particle. Every hour create a Spark Core event. Every hour a Spark Core event is generatedThis is useful in combination with Spark Core firmware that listens to this event, takes some action and publishes another eventThis can be picked up by other Applets, such as https://ifttt.com/Applets/246322-save-data-from-spark-core-in-google-spreadsheet

When Monitor a sensor value from Seeed, do Light up Grove WS2812 LED strip using Seeed. When the outdoor temperature exceeds 90F, Led Strip warning red light. Use Grove Temperature&Humidity and Grove WS2812 LED Strip

When Indoor temperature greater than from ecobee, do Change LED color using SkyBell HD. When indoor temperature is greater than 77, change Skybell HD LED color to Red. When indoor temperature is greater than 77, change Skybell HD LED color to Red
When Carbon dioxide rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Voice announcement using Ubi. CO2 Warning. Warns of rising CO2 levels
